entry.title: விடிகாலையில் தெருவில் அலறிய பெண்.. கர்சீப் கட்டி கொண்டு வந்த 3 பேர் யார்.. நெல்லை திகில் வீடியோ

link.title: விடிகாலையில் தெருவில் அலறிய பெண்.. கர்சீப் கட்டி கொண்டு வந்த 3 பேர் யார்.. நெல்லை திகில் வீடியோ

entry.content:
நெல்லை: விடிகாலை நேரத்தில் வாசலில் போட்டு கொண்டிருந்த பெண்ணின் அலறல் ���த்தம் கேட்டு அக்கம்பக்கத்தினரே திரண்டுவிட்டனர்.. அப்படி ஒரு திகில் சம்பவம்தான் நெல்லையில் நடந்துள்ளது!
nellai chain theft cctv footage release
entry.summary: நெல்லை: விடிகாலை நேரத்தில் வாசலில் போட்டு கொண்டிருந்த பெண்ணின் அலறல் ���த்தம் கேட்டு அக்கம்பக்கத்தினரே திரண்டுவிட்டனர்.. அப்படி ஒரு திகில் சம்பவம்தான் நெல்லையில் நடந்துள்ளது! nellai chain theft cctv footage release

entry.title: A l’occasion des 30 ans du ‘Montreux Comedy Festival’, qui seront diffusés sur France 2 le jeudi 13 août prochain à 21h05, Kev Adams a imaginé un gala prestigieux entouré de ses amis invités

link.title: A l’occasion des 30 ans du ‘Montreux Comedy Festival’, qui seront diffusés sur France 2 le jeudi 13 août prochain à 21h05, Kev Adams a imaginé un gala prestigieux entouré de ses amis invités

entry.title: Pinay scientist leads development of COVID-19 testing technology in Switzerland PEP Specials

link.title: Pinay scientist leads development of COVID-19 testing technology in Switzerland PEP Specials

entry.content:
Someone in the government, please, contact this woman!
She’s Catharine Aquino-Fournier, a University of the Philippines Los Banos Biology graduate who also holds a master’s degree in Genetics.
She’s in Switzerland now and is leading a team in developing a COVID-19 testing technology called Hi-DRA-seq.
To know more about her, what she’s doing and why she should be in the Philippines, watch the video.
To read a related article on this video, click here:
#hidraseq #covid19testingtechnology #catharineaquinofournier
Video Producer: John Henri Mariano
Know the latest in showbiz on
Subscribe to our YouTube channel!
Follow us!
Instagram:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Visit our DailyMotion channel!
Join us on Viber:
entry.summary: Someone in the government, please, contact this woman! She’s Catharine Aquino-Fournier, a University of the Philippines Los Banos Biology graduate who also holds a master’s degree in Genetics. She’s in Switzerland now and is leading a team in developing a COVID-19 testing technology called Hi-DRA-seq. To know more about her, what she’s doing and why she should be in the Philippines, watch the video. To read a related article on this video, click here: #hidraseq #covid19testingtechnology #catharineaquinofournier Video Producer: John Henri Mariano Know the latest in showbiz on Subscribe to our YouTube channel! entry.title: Thomas Tuchel s’inquiète pour ses joueurs

link.title: Thomas Tuchel s’inquiète pour ses joueurs

entry.content: Le PSG jouait contre Sochaux (1-0) son dernier match avant le quart de finale de la Ligue des Champions contre l’Atalanta Bergame. Avant la rencontre, la blessure de Marco Verratti, contractée à l’entraînement, s’est ajoutée à celles de certains de ses camarades. Thomas Tuchel, l’entraîneur du Paris SG, est inquiet.
entry.summary: Le PSG jouait contre Sochaux (1-0) son dernier match avant le quart de finale de la Ligue des Champions contre l’Atalanta Bergame. Avant la rencontre, la blessure de Marco Verratti, contractée à l’entraînement, s’est ajoutée à celles de certains de ses camarades. Thomas Tuchel, l’entraîneur du Paris SG, est inquiet.

entry.title: Filipino nurses play amusing game drawing lots to choose who avoids Covid-19 ward

link.title: Filipino nurses play amusing game drawing lots to choose who avoids Covid-19 ward

entry.content:
Nurses try to cheer themselves up after a long shift at the hospital by playing a "charge nurse elimination" game.
Nurse Rodney Lim said that the COVID-19 cases have spiked in their hometown Cebu City, Philippines so it was a relief for them to be assigned as the "charge nurse."
A charge nurse oversees the needs of the non-coronavirus patients in the hospital, as well as miscellaneous tasks such as checking the other staff and talking to a patient’s family who has concerns.
The task is physically tolling but most nurses prefer the role instead of being assigned to the COVID-19 ward.
The team draw names from a hat and last person standing takes care of the charge nurse role.
Rodney said: "Being a charge nurse is tiring, but it feels like a rest day for us during this pandemic."
In the video taken on July 25, Rodney and colleagues Hanna, Raquel, and Jacoba play the game by drawing lots.
Rodney added: "He said, "We just want to have fun even for a while. We are not escaping our responsibilities since we love what we are doing as a nurse.
"We just do this to relieve our worries this pandemic is giving to us. As nurses, we live because we care.
The number of COVID-19 cases in the Philippines has jumped to 115,980, with a death toll of 2,123
entry.summary: Nurses try to cheer themselves up after a long shift at the hospital by playing a "charge nurse elimination" game. Nurse Rodney Lim said that the COVID-19 cases have spiked in their hometown Cebu City, Philippines so it was a relief for them to be assigned as the "charge nurse." A charge nurse oversees the needs of the non-coronavirus patients in the hospital, as well as miscellaneous tasks such as checking the other staff and talking to a patient’s family who has concerns. The task is physically tolling but most nurses prefer the role instead of being assigned to the COVID-19 ward. The team draw names from a hat and last person standing takes care of the charge nurse role. Rodney said: "Being a charge nurse is tiring, but it feels like a rest day for us during this pandemic." In the video taken on July 25, Rodney and colleagues Hanna, Raquel, and Jacoba play the game by drawing lots. Rodney added: "He said, "We just want to have fun even for a while. We are not escaping our responsibilities since we love what we are doing as a nurse. "We just do this to relieve our worries this pandemic is giving to us. As nurses, we live because we care. The number of COVID-19 cases in the Philippines has jumped to 115,980, with a death toll of 2,123

entry.title: Other Space Q_A_Low

link.title: Other Space Q_A_Low

entry.content:
DUST and Den of Geek teamed up to livestream the first episode of Paul Feig’s greatest sci-fi series you’ve never seen, Other Space.
Check out this Q&A with Paul Feig and the cast of Other Space, including Karan Soni, Eugene Cordero, Bess Rous, Conor Leslie, and Neil Casey! What would you have asked them?
Read on – our full interview with Paul Feig:

entry.title: Raksha Bandhan celebration at Chandani Mahal Police Station Delhi

link.title: Raksha Bandhan celebration at Chandani Mahal Police Station Delhi

entry.content:
Rakshabandhan is an auspicious festival to celebrate the bond between brothers and sisters. Sisters tie rakhi, a holy thread to their brothers and ask for protection. In lieu to that, the brother promises her to protect her throughout and gifts her with presents. Police officers work hard, give up their personal commitments and work towards the city’s protection. To value that, girls tied rakhi to police officers at Chandani mahal police station delhi. 
#Rakshabandhan2020 #Chandanimahal #Coronavirus
entry.summary: Rakshabandhan is an auspicious festival to celebrate the bond between brothers and sisters. Sisters tie rakhi, a holy thread to their brothers and ask for protection. In lieu to that, the brother promises her to protect her throughout and gifts her with presents. Police officers work hard, give up their personal commitments and work towards the city’s protection. To value that, girls tied rakhi to police officers at Chandani mahal police station delhi. #Rakshabandhan2020 #Chandanimahal #Coronavirus

entry.title: Income tax return date extended:ITR फाइल करने की तारीख फिर बढ़ी,जानिए कब तक है मौका वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Income tax return date extended:ITR फाइल करने की तारीख फिर बढ़ी,जानिए कब तक है मौका वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
In view of the Corona crisis in the country, the taxpayers have got a big relief. The Central Board of Direct Taxes has extended the last date for filing income tax returns. Information has been given by the Income Tax Department. The department has said that in view of the Corona crisis, the tax filing deadline for taxpayers is being extended from 31 July to 30 September. The date for filing the original and revised income tax return for the financial year 2018-19 has been extended for the third time. .
देश में कोरोना संकट को देखते हुए करदाताओं को बड़ी राहत मिली है. केंद्रीय प्रत्यक्ष कर बोर्ड ने इनकम टैक्स रिटर्न दाखिल करने की अंतिम तिथि बढ़ा दी है. आयकर विभाग की ओर से इसकी जानकारी दी गई है. विभाग ने कहा है कि कोरोना संकट को देखते हुए करदाताओं के लिए टैक्स भरने की अंतिम तिथि 31 जुलाई से बढ़ाकर 30 सितंबर की जा रही है. फाइनैंशियल इयर 2018-19 के लिए ओरिजिनल और रीवाइज्ड इनकम टैक्स रिटर्न भरने की तारीख तीसरी बार बढ़ाई गई है।
#IncomeTax #IncomeTaxReturn #ITR
entry.summary: In view of the Corona crisis in the country, the taxpayers have got a big relief. The Central Board of Direct Taxes has extended the last date for filing income tax returns. Information has been given by the Income Tax Department. The department has said that in view of the Corona crisis, the tax filing deadline for taxpayers is being extended from 31 July to 30 September. The date for filing the original and revised income tax return for the financial year 2018-19 has been extended for the third time. . देश में कोरोना संकट को देखते हुए करदाताओं को बड़ी राहत मिली है. केंद्रीय प्रत्यक्ष कर बोर्ड ने इनकम टैक्स रिटर्न दाखिल करने की अंतिम तिथि बढ़ा दी है. आयकर विभाग की ओर से इसकी जानकारी दी गई है. विभाग ने कहा है कि कोरोना संकट को देखते हुए करदाताओं के लिए टैक्स भरने की अंतिम तिथि 31 जुलाई से बढ़ाकर 30 सितंबर की जा रही है. फाइनैंशियल इयर 2018-19 के लिए ओरिजिनल और रीवाइज्ड इनकम टैक्स रिटर्न भरने की तारीख तीसरी बार बढ़ाई गई है। #IncomeTax #IncomeTaxReturn #ITR

entry.title: CAMEROONIAN PRESS REVIEW OF AUGUST 06, 2020

link.title: CAMEROONIAN PRESS REVIEW OF AUGUST 06, 2020

entry.content: News of the passing away of Thomas Tangem, Anglophone detainee while chained to his sick bed at the Yaounde Central Hospital Wednesday August 4, 2020 make headline on most papers published this Thursday. The Guardian Post reports on the protest which followed his death and many other issues brought to you in this edition of our press review.
entry.summary: News of the passing away of Thomas Tangem, Anglophone detainee while chained to his sick bed at the Yaounde Central Hospital Wednesday August 4, 2020 make headline on most papers published this Thursday. The Guardian Post reports on the protest which followed his death and many other issues brought to you in this edition of our press review.

entry.title: Marketplace in Indonesia burns as over 50 stalls damaged

link.title: Marketplace in Indonesia burns as over 50 stalls damaged

entry.content: A densely populated marketplace in Jakarta, Indonesia burns in the very early morning of August 7 at around 2 am as officials scramble to extinguish the flames.
entry.summary: A densely populated marketplace in Jakarta, Indonesia burns in the very early morning of August 7 at around 2 am as officials scramble to extinguish the flames.

entry.title: J&K: Army says missing soldier likely abducted by terrorists Oneindia News

link.title: J&K: Army says missing soldier likely abducted by terrorists Oneindia News

entry.content:
UP CM Yogi Adityanath says Covid protocol will be strictly followed in Ayodhya Ram Janmabhoomi event; Army says missing soldier from Kulgam Shakir Manzoor is likely kidnapped; Mumbai police commissioner denies obstructing Bihar Police in Sushant Singh Rajput death probe; Lawyer says Rhea Chakraborty not missing, she hasn’t got summons from Bihar cops; Congress MP Shashi Tharoor wonders ‘why Home Minister chose private hospital’ and more news
#Ayodhya #RamMandir #Kashmir
entry.summary: UP CM Yogi Adityanath says Covid protocol will be strictly followed in Ayodhya Ram Janmabhoomi event; Army says missing soldier from Kulgam Shakir Manzoor is likely kidnapped; Mumbai police commissioner denies obstructing Bihar Police in Sushant Singh Rajput death probe; Lawyer says Rhea Chakraborty not missing, she hasn’t got summons from Bihar cops; Congress MP Shashi Tharoor wonders ‘why Home Minister chose private hospital’ and more news #Ayodhya #RamMandir #Kashmir

entry.title: Un couple de touristes naturistes belges ne veut pas quitter son camping en Mayenne

link.title: Un couple de touristes naturistes belges ne veut pas quitter son camping en Mayenne

entry.content:
Le Belgique a mis le département de la Mayenne en rouge. Malgré de nouvelles mesures pour tenter de limiter la propagation du Covid-19, les ressortissants belges ont pour consigne de rentrer ou abandonner leurs projets.
Dans un camping naturiste de Mayenne, un couple a fait le choix de prolonger ses vacances pour deux mois.«Si je rentrais en Belgique, j’étais cueilli et je ne pouvais plus ressortir» explique l’un des vacanciers.
A la fin de leurs vacances, le couple devra se munir d’un document administratif détaillant son séjour en France.
entry.summary: Le Belgique a mis le département de la Mayenne en rouge. Malgré de nouvelles mesures pour tenter de limiter la propagation du Covid-19, les ressortissants belges ont pour consigne de rentrer ou abandonner leurs projets. Dans un camping naturiste de Mayenne, un couple a fait le choix de prolonger ses vacances pour deux mois.«Si je rentrais en Belgique, j’étais cueilli et je ne pouvais plus ressortir» explique l’un des vacanciers. A la fin de leurs vacances, le couple devra se munir d’un document administratif détaillant son séjour en France.

entry.title: Tiger Woods Misses Five Fairways, Still Has Solid Day 1 At PGA Championship

link.title: Tiger Woods Misses Five Fairways, Still Has Solid Day 1 At PGA Championship

entry.content: Tiger Woods missed five fairways, but still managed to stay in contention in the first round of the PGA Championship.
entry.summary: Tiger Woods missed five fairways, but still managed to stay in contention in the first round of the PGA Championship.

entry.title: Manoj Sinha होंगे जम्मू-कश्मीर के नए उपराज्यपाल, जीसी मुर्मू का इस्तीफा स्वीकार वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Manoj Sinha होंगे जम्मू-कश्मीर के नए उपराज्यपाल, जीसी मुर्मू का इस्तीफा स्वीकार वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Jammu and Kashmir Lieutenant Governor GC Murmu has resigned. President Ram Nath Kovind has accepted the resignation of GC Murmu. Murmu’s resignation came on a day when most of the provisions of Article 370 of the Constitution giving special status to Jammu and Kashmir were completed, a year to be abolished.Former Union Minister and Bharatiya Janata Party leader Manoj Sinha will now be the new Lieutenant Governor of Jammu and Kashmir
जम्मू-कश्मीर के उपराज्यपाल जीसी मुर्मू ने इस्तीफा दे दिया है. राष्ट्रपति रामनाथ कोविंद ने जीसी मुर्मू का इस्तीफा स्वीकार कर लिया है. मुर्मू का इस्तीफा ऐसे दिन आया है, जब जम्मू कश्मीर को विशेष दर्जा देने वाले संविधान के अनुच्छेद 370 के अधिकतर प्रावधानों को समाप्त किए जाने का एक वर्ष पूरा हुआ..पूर्व केंद्रीय मंत्री और भारतीय जनता पार्टी के नेता मनोज सिन्हा अब जम्मू और कश्मीर के नए उपराज्यपाल होंगे
#GirishChandraMurmu #ManojSinha #LieutenantGovernorJammu&Kashmir
entry.summary: Jammu and Kashmir Lieutenant Governor GC Murmu has resigned. President Ram Nath Kovind has accepted the resignation of GC Murmu. Murmu’s resignation came on a day when most of the provisions of Article 370 of the Constitution giving special status to Jammu and Kashmir were completed, a year to be abolished.Former Union Minister and Bharatiya Janata Party leader Manoj Sinha will now be the new Lieutenant Governor of Jammu and Kashmir जम्मू-कश्मीर के उपराज्यपाल जीसी मुर्मू ने इस्तीफा दे दिया है. राष्ट्रपति रामनाथ कोविंद ने जीसी मुर्मू का इस्तीफा स्वीकार कर लिया है. मुर्मू का इस्तीफा ऐसे दिन आया है, जब जम्मू कश्मीर को विशेष दर्जा देने वाले संविधान के अनुच्छेद 370 के अधिकतर प्रावधानों को समाप्त किए जाने का एक वर्ष पूरा हुआ..पूर्व केंद्रीय मंत्री और भारतीय जनता पार्टी के नेता मनोज सिन्हा अब जम्मू और कश्मीर के नए उपराज्यपाल होंगे #GirishChandraMurmu #ManojSinha #LieutenantGovernorJammu&Kashmir

entry.title: UTS2 - Day 3 Preview: Felix Auger-Aliassime vs Alexander Zverev

link.title: UTS2 - Day 3 Preview: Felix Auger-Aliassime vs Alexander Zverev

entry.content: Big cats. Big power. Get ready for big-game hunting. The Panther Felix Auger-Aliassime, at just 19 years old, and The Lion Alexander Zverev, age 23, are eager to get their paws on the UTS2 prize.
entry.summary: Big cats. Big power. Get ready for big-game hunting. The Panther Felix Auger-Aliassime, at just 19 years old, and The Lion Alexander Zverev, age 23, are eager to get their paws on the UTS2 prize.

entry.title: Bridge built around house after owner refuses to move in China

link.title: Bridge built around house after owner refuses to move in China

entry.content:
A bridge was built around a house after the owner refused to move as they were not satisfied with their new flat in eastern China.
The video, filmed in the city of Guangzhou in Guangdong Province on August 3, shows a 10-square-metre house left standing in the middle of a newly-built bridge.
Local residents were seen visiting and taking pictures of the house, while the house owner Ms Liang was being interviewed.
According to Liang, the new flat provided by the local government was opposite a hospital’s morgue, so she refused to move there.
Since the local authorities cannot reach an agreement with Ms Liang, they changed the design of the bridge and built it around her house.
The local authorities are still negotiating with the house owner.
The video was provided by local media with permission.
entry.summary: A bridge was built around a house after the owner refused to move as they were not satisfied with their new flat in eastern China. The video, filmed in the city of Guangzhou in Guangdong Province on August 3, shows a 10-square-metre house left standing in the middle of a newly-built bridge. Local residents were seen visiting and taking pictures of the house, while the house owner Ms Liang was being interviewed. According to Liang, the new flat provided by the local government was opposite a hospital’s morgue, so she refused to move there. Since the local authorities cannot reach an agreement with Ms Liang, they changed the design of the bridge and built it around her house. The local authorities are still negotiating with the house owner. The video was provided by local media with permission.
